textPlain: For Gleam//Erlang is there an easy way to package up an executable you can distribute without also shipping Erlang?
Amazing to hear success stories of Gleam in production! Running on the beam really feels like a super power

No, the VM needs to be installed on the machine, similar to C#, Java, Python, etc.There have been some projects for creating self-extracting executable archives for the VM, and some projects for compiling BEAM programs to native code, but nothing has become well established yet.
You can compile to javascript as well.
